# Allowlist corpus — each non-comment line is a command string that MUST
# pass the sanitiser as-is. NO wrapper substrings, NO subshells, NO
# env-prefix tricks, NO here-docs / here-strings, NO chaining operators.
# See ./README.md for the contamination rule.

# category: git-read-only
git status
git status --short
git diff
git diff --stat
git diff HEAD
git log
git log --oneline -10
git show HEAD
git show HEAD:path/to/file.txt
git ls-files
git check-ignore .env
git rev-parse HEAD
git rev-parse --short HEAD
git symbolic-ref HEAD

# category: git-staging
git add file.txt
git add .
git add -A

# category: git-commit
git commit -m "fix: typo"
git commit -m "multi word message"

# category: git-config
git config --get user.email
git config --list
git config --get-regexp '^user\.'

# category: non-git-passthrough
ls -la
cat file.txt
node parser/cli.mjs
jq . file.json
